title: Glowing mOres
description: Another emissive texture resourcepack with mods support like Create and more!
body:
# Make ore blocks glow in the darkness
Beside vanilla ores, this resource pack supports several mods too.

## Supported mods:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- [Powah!](https://modrinth.com/mod/powah)
- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Pixelmon](https://modrinth.com/mod/pixelmon)
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- [Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)
- [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals)
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Create: Dreams & Desires](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-dreams-and-desires)
- [Overworld Netherite Ore](https://modrinth.com/mod/overworld-netherite-ore)
- [Thermal Foundation](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-foundation)
- [Gravelmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravelmon)
- [Gobber](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber)
- [Ascension Megamons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascension-megamons)
- [Paradise Lost](https://modrinth.com/mod/paradise-lost)
</details>

## Requirements for Forge:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
### Option 1:
  
  - [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
  - [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)
### Option 2:

  - [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
</details>

## Requirements for Fabric:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
### Option 1:
  
 - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
 - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
 - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)

### Option 2:
  - [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)
  - [MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)

### Option 3:

 - [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
 - [Optifabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric)

</details>

Join our discord to request more mods support! [Discord](https://discord.gg/rEh98KrNU2)
